data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. REALLY SAVAGE goes very well this course and distance starting nine times for three wins and three minors. Placed last time (17.93) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 3.5 lengths. Looks the one to beat with even luck. 1. DESPICABLE NITRO turned spotting a big start finishing seventh (22.83) last time in a Grade 5 at Maitland. Strong form has emerged from his last run. Expected to feature in the finish. 7. JUNGLE GYM was below best last time at this track (17.86) in a Grade 5, finishing a 6 length fifth. Has already won out of this draw.","runners":[3,1,7],"exclusive":false}
